/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/game.dir/game_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/Archer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/BattleGrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/Cell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/Character.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/GameManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/Mage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/Warrior.cpp.o -o game  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
